creator: vishwin@freebsd.org
text:
During package, the following errors are emitted:

=======================<phase: package        >============================
===>  Building package for arm-none-eabi-gcc-6.3.0_5
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/arm-none-eabi-gcc/work/stage/usr/local/lib/gcc/arm-none-eabi/6.3.0/include-fixed/netinet/ip_fil.h:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/arm-none-eabi-gcc/work/stage/usr/local/lib/gcc/arm-none-eabi/6.3.0/include-fixed/netinet/ip_lookup.h:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/arm-none-eabi-gcc/work/stage/usr/local/lib/gcc/arm-none-eabi/6.3.0/include-fixed/netinet/ip_nat.h:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/arm-none-eabi-gcc/work/stage/usr/local/lib/gcc/arm-none-eabi/6.3.0/include-fixed/netinet/ip_proxy.h:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/arm-none-eabi-gcc/work/stage/usr/local/lib/gcc/arm-none-eabi/6.3.0/include-fixed/netinet/ip_scan.h:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/arm-none-eabi-gcc/work/stage/usr/local/lib/gcc/arm-none-eabi/6.3.0/include-fixed/netinet/ip_state.h:No such file or directory
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/devel/arm-none-eabi-gcc

There are probably more ports affected by this.
